weaknesses: No mention of badge/visitor access systems
On-site NYC headquarters tenure not specified
improvement_bullets: Served as the primary point of contact for office operations, managing front-desk reception, visitor access, and vendor deliveries to ensure a seamless, professional experience for candidates and guests.
Managed office safety and security protocols, including overseeing badge compliance, maintaining building security logs, and collaborating with facility management to address workplace safety needs.
Streamlined daily office operations, including managing inventory of supplies, maintaining workspace organization, and coordinating on-site meeting room technology for staff and visitors.
Facilitated seamless onboarding logistics for new hires, acting as the welcoming presence in the office and ensuring all necessary equipment and workspace access were prepared upon arrival.
Enhanced front-of-house operations by implementing improved visitor check-in procedures, resulting in more efficient visitor traffic flow and strengthened facility security compliance.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Executive Assistant & Workplace Coordinator opportunity with GameChanger. I am interested in this opportunity because I am deeply inspired by GameChanger’s mission to elevate youth sports and build a community-driven, tech-forward culture. What interests me about working for GameChanger is your commitment to combining high-level administrative efficiency with a welcoming, human-centric office environment, which resonates with my own professional philosophy. I believe my 10+ years of C-level executive support and my comprehensive background in office operations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive, solution-oriented mindset that prioritizes executive success while maintaining an inviting workplace. In fact, while supporting the C-suite at Direct Clean Solutions, I took initiative beyond my core scheduling duties to manage building operations and vendor coordination, ensuring that our executive workflows were never disrupted by facility-related issues. By bridging the gap between high-level calendar management and day-to-day office logistics, I reduced operational friction and allowed the leadership team to focus entirely on growth. Ultimately, I know that the Executive Assistant & Workplace Coordinator role at GameChanger would allow me to bring my refined scheduling and prioritization skills to help your senior leaders manage their most complex tasks. Additionally, my role as an Executive Assistant at Direct Clean Solutions enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. I frequently managed confidential communication channels and vendor relations, ensuring that our security protocols and office flow remained professional and compliant. These experiences directly translate to the front-of-house and security responsibilities required by GameChanger. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in operations management in working on the day-to-day office experience at GameChanger. I know that my executive support experience and my dedication to office culture align with what it takes to succeed at the Executive Assistant & Workplace Coordinator role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
